raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 915 empowers local communities to govern autonomous vehicles.",
    "The State of California has granted deployment of autonomous vehicles in the Bay Area and Los Angeles without regard to local jurisdictions or their public safety concerns.",
    "Local law enforcement agencies are unable to ticket autonomous vehicles for moving violations.",
    "Driverless robotaxis have been involved in hundreds of accidents in San Francisco alone.",
    "SB 915 grants local authorities the same oversight between driverless and traditional vehicles without removing state authority.",
    "Local resolutions supporting SB 915 demonstrate the growing recognition in communities across California that local input is crucial for safe autonomous vehicle deployment."
  ]
}
```
